title: Dimensional Storage
wikitext:
[[File:Hammerspace.jpg|thumb|400px|[[wikipedia:Hammerspace|Source]]]]

==Summary==
'''Dimensional Storage''' (also called '''Hammerspace''' or '''Magic satchel''') is the ability to store as many items as one wishes in a sort of "storage area" without any regard for running out of room. Users are then able to summon the desired item(s) at their whim, making it seem as if they pulled each object out of thin air.

This ability is typically not used with any canonical explanations in fictional works.

==Possible Uses==
*Entering the storage to hide from enemies.
*Trapping enemies inside the storage.

==Limitations==
*Heavier objects may strain the user.
*The entry-point may place limits for the size of stored object.

==Users==
*Many video game characters and [[Toon Force]] wielders
*[[Ramona Flowers]] ([[Scott Pilgrim (Verse)|Scott Pilgrim vs. the World]])
*[[Pinkie Pie]] ([[My Little Pony|My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic]])
*[[Homura Akemi]] ([[Puella Magi Verse|Puella Magi Madoka Magica]])
*[[Ranma Saotome]]
